scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src='materials/node_sqlite3.node';const dst='node_modules/sqlite3/lib/binding/node-v108-win32-x64/node_sqlite3.node';if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(dst),{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(src,dst);console.log('SQLite3 binary installed');}else{console.log('Note: SQLite3 binary not found in materials/')}"
